options.a: caused in the territory of a Contracting State or in a ship or aircraft registered there in, by an aircraft registered in the territory of another Contracting State.
options.b: only caused in the territory of a Contracting State by an aircraft registered in the territory of another Contracting State.
options.c: caused in the territory of a Contracting State by any aircraft regardless the registration.
options.d: the above convention does not deal with any of the items listed.
